name: url-redirect-analyzer
description: Full-stack URL redirect analyzer with a React dashboard, Express API, and MongoDB history.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --include=dev --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --include=dev --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.render-build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --include=dev --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
